_comment: EU hub via run-playwright-sauce-matrix.ts. `matrix` = all OS × browser combos supported by Playwright → Selenium Grid → Sauce hybrid (CDP: Chrome + MicrosoftEdge on desktop only). `_disabled_matrix` = Firefox, Safari/WebKit, Android, etc.

_disabled_matrix._reason: Firefox is not supported on this Playwright → Selenium Grid → Sauce hybrid path (no remote CDP session). Run Firefox locally with ENABLE_MULTI_BROWSER_PROJECTS=true or use another Sauce product.
Apple Safari is not offered on Windows on Sauce for this flow; Safari/WebKit is not supported via this Grid integration (see eu-mac-safari).
Same as eu-win-firefox: Firefox remote via this hybrid Selenium Grid path is not supported.
WebKit/Safari is not supported on Playwright → Selenium Grid → Sauce for this script; run WebKit locally or use Appium/native WebDriver on Sauce outside this flow.
Android Chrome on Sauce needs mobile automation (e.g. Appium) or Sauce real devices; this job uses desktop Selenium Grid + Playwright project `chrome`, not Android host + MobileChrome.
Android Firefox is not covered by this desktop Grid hybrid; use Gecko/Appium or Sauce mobile offerings outside this script.
Microsoft Edge on Android is not targeted by this Playwright Selenium Grid flow (desktop Edge only).
Safari does not exist on Android; WebKit on mobile is iOS (see local Playwright MobileSafari or native mobile tooling).
Safari does not run on Linux; WebKit locally uses project `webkit` on the agent, not Sauce Grid here.
Same Firefox Grid limitation as Windows/macOS.
